name: anxiety-buddy
description: Modern monorepo starter for building cross-platform apps with React, TypeScript, and Firebase

scripts.app:ios: cd app && npx cap run ios
scripts.app:android: cd app && npx cap run android
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd app && npm install && cd ../backend/functions && npm install && cd ../../web && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules app/node_modules backend/functions/node_modules web/node_modules app/dist web/dist backend/functions/lib
